title: Better Apple Drops
description: Tweaks apple drop rate from leaves.
body:
Chance for a single apple to drop from a leaf block:
| Condition                | Original   | Better Apple Drops |
|:------------------------:|:----------:|:------------------:|
| Normal Breaking or Decay | 0.5%       | 0.7%               |
| Fortune I                | 0.556%     | 1%                 |
| Fortune II               | 0.625%     | 1.5%               |
| Fortune III              | 0.833%     | 3%                 |

Note that this applies to both oak and dark oak leaves.

This increase of odds doesn't seem like much but it makes a big difference. You can actually get a substantial amount of apples in a reasonable amount of time. This means that you'll no longer feel the need to kidnap and breed villagers just to get a steady supply of apples.

### **Datapack Installation**:  Drag and drop the .zip file into the datapack folder of your world.
